top_signals.title: How Poland Became Europe’s Growth Leader
top_signals.summary: Poland has become one of Europe’s standout growth stories, with an economy that crossed $1 trillion and a new generation of entrepreneurs returning home after studying and working abroad. Finance Minister Andrzej Domański points to decades of reform, EU integration, foreign investment and a diversified economy as drivers of Poland’s rise, while venture capitalist Aleksandra Pedraszewska says Warsaw’s technology scene now offers opportunities that were far less obvious a decade ago. But economists warn that sustaining the boom will require Poland to address large deficits, elevated defense spending, demographic decline and the need for more investment in research, education and innovation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
top_signals.summary: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Wall Street bulls bet US stocks rally will defy bubble fears
top_signals.summary: Investors and strategists shrug off worries that markets could be overheating by betting on huge gains for AI-linked shares

top_signals.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]

Bitcoin dip buyers curb selling but questionable spot, futures volumes highlight weakness
